description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized white sedan with a streamlined body and a gently sloping roofline, characteristic of contemporary urban vehicles. The car features four doors, alloy wheels, and a sunroof, with a prominent front grille and angular headlights. The windows are tinted, and the side mirrors are aerodynamically shaped. The rear of the car includes a subtle integrated spoiler and sleek taillights. The vehicle's overall design emphasizes both style and functionality, suitable for city driving and commuting. The interior, visible through the windows, appears to have standard seating and dashboard arrangements typical of passenger cars.
description: A sleek, modern white sedan with four doors, alloy wheels, and a sunroof, featuring angular headlights and a streamlined profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, angular headlights, and sunroof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, alloy wheels, and sloping roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taillights, integrated spoiler, and rear window.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the doors, wheels, and overall profile.
attribute_headlight_design: Dual angular headlights with integrated LED strips
